page.title: Marbella Boat Rental Group Size Limits 2026: What You Need to Know

data.meta_description: Discover Marbella boat rental group size limits 2026 for Puerto Banús charters. Max 12 pax on most yachts—book your 8-hour trip from €2,299.
data.summary: This guide explains Marbella boat rental group size limits for 2026, covering passenger capacities on our fleet from Puerto Banús. Find out which yacht fits your party and what's included.
key_facts: Maximum 12 pax on most yachts (Mangusta 80, Azimut 58, Ferretti 94, etc.)
Smaller boats: Dubhe (5 pax), Mariah SX21 (5 pax), Speedboat (6 pax)
Mangusta 80 (all variants): 12 pax, minimum 4h at €4,719 with jet ski
All charters include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and IVA
Departs exclusively from Puerto Banús, Marbella
Pricing on request via WhatsApp for boats not in Tier A or B

faq.q: What is the maximum group size for a boat rental in Marbella in 2026?
faq.a: Most yachts in our fleet, including the Mangusta 80, Azimut 58 Flybridge, and Ferretti 94, accommodate up to 12 passengers. Smaller boats like the Dubhe and Mariah SX21 take up to 5 passengers. Check individual boat specs for exact limits.

faq.q: Can I rent a boat for a group of 10 people in Marbella?
faq.a: Yes, many of our yachts fit 10-12 passengers. The Astondoa 40 (9 pax), Azimut 39 (11 pax), and Fairline Targa 12m (10 pax) are popular choices. For 10 guests, we recommend the Azimut 39 or Pershing 46.

faq.q: Are children included in the passenger count?
faq.a: Yes, all passengers, including infants and children, count towards the maximum capacity. Safety regulations require strict adherence to these limits. Life jackets are provided for all ages.

faq.q: What happens if our group exceeds the size limit?
faq.a: We cannot exceed the certified passenger capacity for safety and insurance reasons. You may need to split into two boats or choose a larger yacht. Contact us via WhatsApp to discuss options.

faq.q: Do you offer boats for larger groups, like 15 people?
faq.a: Our largest yachts (e.g., Ferretti 94, Canados 86) have a maximum of 12 pax. For groups over 12, we recommend chartering two boats simultaneously. We can arrange this—just ask via WhatsApp.

faq.q: What is included in the price for a group charter?
faq.a: All charters include a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden costs.

faq.q: How far in advance should I book for a large group?
faq.a: For groups of 10-12, we recommend booking at least 2-4 weeks ahead, especially in peak season (June-September). Contact us via WhatsApp for availability.

faq.q: Can we bring our own food and drinks on board?
faq.a: Yes, you are welcome to bring additional food and beverages. Our standard package already includes drinks and snacks. Just avoid glass bottles on some boats—check with your skipper.

data.body_html:
Planning a group charter in Marbella for 2026? Understanding the Marbella boat rental group size limits 2026 is essential to ensure your party fits comfortably and legally. Our fleet from Puerto Banús has strict passenger capacities—from 5 to 12 people—depending on the yacht. This guide breaks down the limits for every boat, what's included, and how to book the right size for your group.

Why Group Size Limits Matter

Spanish maritime law and insurance policies set a maximum passenger count for each vessel. Exceeding this invalidates coverage and can lead to fines. All our charters include licensed skippers, safety equipment, and insurance, so we never exceed the certified capacity. For a safe day on the Costa del Sol, always check the limit before booking.

Group Size Limits by Boat

Our fleet departs exclusively from Puerto Banús. Here's the passenger capacity for each yacht:

  • Astondoa 40 (12.5m) – 9 pax
  • Azimut 39 (12.5m) – 11 pax
  • Mangusta 80 (24m, all variants) – 12 pax
  • Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m) – 12 pax
  • Bandido (11.5m) – 8 pax
  • Canados 86 (26m) – 12 pax
  • Dubhe (8m) – 5 pax
  • Fairline Targa 12m (12m) – 10 pax
  • Ferretti 94 (29m) – 12 pax
  • K80 (24m) – 12 pax
  • Lagoon 380 (11.6m) – 10 pax
  • Mariah SX21 (6.4m) – 5 pax
  • Pershing 46 (14m) – 10 pax
  • Red Tide (11m) – 6 pax
  • Speedboat (7m) – 6 pax
  • Maiora 26m (26m) – 12 pax

For groups of 10-12, the Mangusta 80, Azimut 58, or Ferretti 94 are ideal. Smaller parties of 5-6 can choose the Dubhe, Mariah SX21, or Speedboat.

Pricing for Different Group Sizes

Our pricing is transparent. For Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39), the cost is €749 for 2 hours up to €2,299 for 8 hours—all inclusive. Tier B (Mangusta 80) starts at €4,719 for a minimum 4 hours and includes a jet ski. All other boats are priced on request via WhatsApp. Remember, the price covers the whole boat, not per person, so larger groups often get better value per head.

How to Choose the Right Yacht for Your Group

Start by counting your guests. For 9 or fewer, the Astondoa 40 is a cost-effective choice. For up to 11, the Azimut 39 offers more space. If you're 12, go for the Mangusta 80, Azimut 58 Flybridge, Canados 86, or Ferretti 94. For intimate groups of 5, the Dubhe or Mariah SX21 are perfect for a quick spin. Need help? Contact us via WhatsApp for personalised advice.

What's Included in Every Charter

No hidden extras. Every booking includes:

  • Licensed skipper
  • Fuel
  • Water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava
  • Light snacks
  • Insurance and safety equipment
  • Spanish IVA (21%)

You can also bring your own food and drinks. Just avoid glass on some vessels.

Booking Tips for Large Groups

Peak season (June-September) fills up fast for 12-pax yachts. Book 2-4 weeks ahead. If your group exceeds 12, consider chartering two boats—we can arrange this. All departures are from Puerto Banús, close to Marbella's Golden Mile. Popular routes include Marbella coastal charters to Cabopino, Estepona, or Sotogrande.

Frequently asked questions

What is the maximum group size for a boat rental in Marbella in 2026?

Most yachts in our fleet, including the Mangusta 80, Azimut 58 Flybridge, and Ferretti 94, accommodate up to 12 passengers. Smaller boats like the Dubhe and Mariah SX21 take up to 5 passengers. Check individual boat specs for exact limits.

Can I rent a boat for a group of 10 people in Marbella?

Yes, many of our yachts fit 10-12 passengers. The Astondoa 40 (9 pax), Azimut 39 (11 pax), and Fairline Targa 12m (10 pax) are popular choices. For 10 guests, we recommend the Azimut 39 or Pershing 46.

Are children included in the passenger count?

Yes, all passengers, including infants and children, count towards the maximum capacity. Safety regulations require strict adherence to these limits. Life jackets are provided for all ages.

What happens if our group exceeds the size limit?

We cannot exceed the certified passenger capacity for safety and insurance reasons. You may need to split into two boats or choose a larger yacht. Contact us via WhatsApp to discuss options.

Do you offer boats for larger groups, like 15 people?

Our largest yachts (e.g., Ferretti 94, Canados 86) have a maximum of 12 pax. For groups over 12, we recommend chartering two boats simultaneously. We can arrange this—just ask via WhatsApp.

What is included in the price for a group charter?

All charters include a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden costs.

How far in advance should I book for a large group?

For groups of 10-12, we recommend booking at least 2-4 weeks ahead, especially in peak season (June-September). Contact us via WhatsApp for availability.

Can we bring our own food and drinks on board?

Yes, you are welcome to bring additional food and beverages. Our standard package already includes drinks and snacks. Just avoid glass bottles on some boats—check with your skipper.

Ready to book? Browse our full fleet or read our complete Marbella boat rental guide for more tips.
